name: Alternate Data Streams Writing Files
notes:
This building block detects Alternate Data Stream (ADS) writing files. ADS may be used to store configuration files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sami Ruohonen
SIGMA Title: NTFS Alternate Data Stream
SIGMA Description: Detects writing data into NTFS alternate data streams from powershell. Needs Script Block Logging.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Object Access Success, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?-stream.*') AND (LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?set-content.*') OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?add-content.*')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Alternate Data Streams Writing Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Object Access Success, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?-stream.*') AND (LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?set-content.*') OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES ('.*?add-content.*')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Alternate Data Streams Writing Files
Event description: Detects Alternate Data Stream (ADS) writing files. ADS may be used to store configuration files.
